languages.text: {n}Чуть успокоившись, Ювенна одобрительно кивает вам.{/n} "Благодарю, {name}. Твой вклад в свершившееся {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}воистину бесценен{/d}, и он не останется незамеченным... Мне жаль, отец, что ты не устоял перед этим искушением, но видит Бог-Император, я пыталась вернуть тебя на праведный путь". {n}Не дождавшись ответа, она направляется к дверям, и оборачивается к вам уже у самого выхода.{/n} "Последняя просьба, {name}. Держи этого еретика на прицеле до тех пор, пока я не вернусь вместе с инквизитором аф Иррамоном".

traits.locale_text: {n}Чуть успокоившись, Ювенна одобрительно кивает вам.{/n} "Благодарю, {name}. Твой вклад в свершившееся {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}воистину бесценен{/d}, и он не останется незамеченным... Мне жаль, отец, что ты не устоял перед этим искушением, но видит Бог-Император, я пыталась вернуть тебя на праведный путь". {n}Не дождавшись ответа, она направляется к дверям, и оборачивается к вам уже у самого выхода.{/n} "Последняя просьба, {name}. Держи этого еретика на прицеле до тех пор, пока я не вернусь вместе с инквизитором аф Иррамоном".
traits.speaker: JuvennaVonValancius

languages.text: {n}Calming down a little, Juvenna nods approvingly at you.{/n} "Thank you, {name}. Your contribution to what has been accomplished is {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}truly invaluable{/d}, and it will not go unnoticed... I am sorry, Father, that you could not resist this temptation, but, the God-Emperor knows, I tried to lead you back to the path of righteousness." {n}Without waiting for a response, she heads for the door, and turns back to you just as she is about to exit.{/n} "One last request, {name}. Keep this heretic in your sights until I return with Inquisitor af Irramon."

Держи этого еретика на прицеле до тех пор, пока я не вернусь вместе с инквизитором аф Иррамоном".

Keep this heretic in your sights until I return with Inquisitor af Irramon."

languages.text: {n}稍稍平复情绪后，尤文娜向你点头致意。{/n}“谢谢你，{name}。你所做的贡献{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}不可估量{/d}，不会被遗忘……我很遗憾，父亲，你没能抵挡住诱惑。但神皇知晓，我曾竭力引你重回正道。”{n}不等回答，她转身离去，却在门口停下，再次回望你。{/n}“最后一个请求，{name}。在我带阿夫·伊拉蒙审判官回来之前，盯紧这个异端。”
languages.original_text: {n}Calming down a little, Juvenna nods approvingly at you.{/n} "Thank you, {name}. Your contribution to what has been accomplished is {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}truly invaluable{/d}, and it will not go unnoticed... I am sorry, Father, that you could not resist this temptation, but, the God-Emperor knows, I tried to lead you back to the path of righteousness." {n}Without waiting for a response, she heads for the door, and turns back to you just as she is about to exit.{/n} "One last request, {name}. Keep this heretic in your sights until I return with Inquisitor af Irramon."

traits.locale_text: {n}稍稍平复情绪后，尤文娜向你点头致意。{/n}“谢谢你，{name}。你所做的贡献{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}不可估量{/d}，不会被遗忘……我很遗憾，父亲，你没能抵挡住诱惑。但神皇知晓，我曾竭力引你重回正道。”{n}不等回答，她转身离去，却在门口停下，再次回望你。{/n}“最后一个请求，{name}。在我带阿夫·伊拉蒙审判官回来之前，盯紧这个异端。”

languages.text: {n}Se calmant légèrement, Juvenna vous adresse un hochement de tête.{/n} « Merci, {name}. Votre contribution aux événements du jour aura été {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}inestimable{/d}, et cela ne passera pas inaperçu... Père, je suis désolée que vous n'ayez pas su résister à la tentation ; ce n'est pourtant pas faute d'avoir tout fait pour vous ramener sur le droit chemin, que l'Empereur-Dieu m'en soit témoin. » {n}Sans attendre de réponse, elle se dirige vers la porte, mais se retourne un instant vers vous juste avant de la franchir.{/n} « Une dernière chose, {name}. Ne quittez pas cet hérétique des yeux pendant que je vais chercher l'inquisiteur af Irramon. »
languages.original_text: {n}Calming down a little, Juvenna nods approvingly at you.{/n} "Thank you, {name}. Your contribution to what has been accomplished is {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}truly invaluable{/d}, and it will not go unnoticed... I am sorry, Father, that you could not resist this temptation, but, the God-Emperor knows, I tried to lead you back to the path of righteousness." {n}Without waiting for a response, she heads for the door, and turns back to you just as she is about to exit.{/n} "One last request, {name}. Keep this heretic in your sights until I return with Inquisitor af Irramon."

traits.locale_text: {n}Se calmant légèrement, Juvenna vous adresse un hochement de tête.{/n} « Merci, {name}. Votre contribution aux événements du jour aura été {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}inestimable{/d}, et cela ne passera pas inaperçu... Père, je suis désolée que vous n'ayez pas su résister à la tentation ; ce n'est pourtant pas faute d'avoir tout fait pour vous ramener sur le droit chemin, que l'Empereur-Dieu m'en soit témoin. » {n}Sans attendre de réponse, elle se dirige vers la porte, mais se retourne un instant vers vous juste avant de la franchir.{/n} « Une dernière chose, {name}. Ne quittez pas cet hérétique des yeux pendant que je vais chercher l'inquisiteur af Irramon. »

languages.text: {n}Juvenna se tranquiliza un poco y asiente hacia ti con aprobación.{/n} «Gracias, {name}. Su contribución a los acontecimientos es {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}innegable{/d} y no pasará desapercibida... Padre, lamento que no hayas podido resistirte a la tentación, pero el Dios Emperador sabe que he intentado llevarte de vuelta al buen camino». {n}Sin esperar respuesta, se dirige a la salida, girándose justo antes de salir.{/n} «Un último favor, {name}. Vigile a este hereje hasta que regrese con el Inquisidor af Irramon».
languages.original_text: {n}Calming down a little, Juvenna nods approvingly at you.{/n} "Thank you, {name}. Your contribution to what has been accomplished is {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}truly invaluable{/d}, and it will not go unnoticed... I am sorry, Father, that you could not resist this temptation, but, the God-Emperor knows, I tried to lead you back to the path of righteousness." {n}Without waiting for a response, she heads for the door, and turns back to you just as she is about to exit.{/n} "One last request, {name}. Keep this heretic in your sights until I return with Inquisitor af Irramon."

traits.locale_text: {n}Juvenna se tranquiliza un poco y asiente hacia ti con aprobación.{/n} «Gracias, {name}. Su contribución a los acontecimientos es {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}innegable{/d} y no pasará desapercibida... Padre, lamento que no hayas podido resistirte a la tentación, pero el Dios Emperador sabe que he intentado llevarte de vuelta al buen camino». {n}Sin esperar respuesta, se dirige a la salida, girándose justo antes de salir.{/n} «Un último favor, {name}. Vigile a este hereje hasta que regrese con el Inquisidor af Irramon».

languages.text: {n}Biraz sakinleşen Juvenna, onaylar anlamda sana başını sallıyor.{/n} "Teşekkürler {name}. Başarılanlara katkınız gerçekten {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}paha biçilmez{/d}. Gözden kaçmayacak bu... Ayartmaya karşı koyamadığın için üzgünüm baba. Tanrı İmparator biliyor ya, seni tekrar doğruluk yoluna döndürmeye çalıştım." {n}Cevap beklemeden kapıya yöneliyor. Tam çıkmak üzereyken sana dönüyor.{/n} "Son bir ricam var {name}. Ben Engizisyoncu af İrramon ile dönene dek bu kâfiri gözünün önünden ayırma."
languages.original_text: {n}Calming down a little, Juvenna nods approvingly at you.{/n} "Thank you, {name}. Your contribution to what has been accomplished is {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}truly invaluable{/d}, and it will not go unnoticed... I am sorry, Father, that you could not resist this temptation, but, the God-Emperor knows, I tried to lead you back to the path of righteousness." {n}Without waiting for a response, she heads for the door, and turns back to you just as she is about to exit.{/n} "One last request, {name}. Keep this heretic in your sights until I return with Inquisitor af Irramon."

traits.locale_text: {n}Biraz sakinleşen Juvenna, onaylar anlamda sana başını sallıyor.{/n} "Teşekkürler {name}. Başarılanlara katkınız gerçekten {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}paha biçilmez{/d}. Gözden kaçmayacak bu... Ayartmaya karşı koyamadığın için üzgünüm baba. Tanrı İmparator biliyor ya, seni tekrar doğruluk yoluna döndürmeye çalıştım." {n}Cevap beklemeden kapıya yöneliyor. Tam çıkmak üzereyken sana dönüyor.{/n} "Son bir ricam var {name}. Ben Engizisyoncu af İrramon ile dönene dek bu kâfiri gözünün önünden ayırma."

languages.text: {n}Juvenna beruhigt sich ein wenig und nickt dir zustimmend zu.{/n} "Danke, {name}. Euer Beitrag zu unserem Erfolg war {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}unbezahlbar{/d} und wird nicht unbemerkt bleiben ... Es tut mir leid, Vater, dass Ihr der Versuchung nicht widerstehen konntet, aber der Gottimperator weiß, ich habe alles versucht, um Euch auf den Weg der Rechtschaffenheit zurückzuführen." {n}Ohne ein Antwort abzuwarten, eilt sie zur Tür und dreht sich im letzten Moment noch einmal zu dir um.{/n} "Eine letzte Bitte noch, {name}. Behaltet diesen Ketzer im Auge, bis ich mit Inquisitor af Irramon zurückkehre."
languages.original_text: {n}Calming down a little, Juvenna nods approvingly at you.{/n} "Thank you, {name}. Your contribution to what has been accomplished is {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}truly invaluable{/d}, and it will not go unnoticed... I am sorry, Father, that you could not resist this temptation, but, the God-Emperor knows, I tried to lead you back to the path of righteousness." {n}Without waiting for a response, she heads for the door, and turns back to you just as she is about to exit.{/n} "One last request, {name}. Keep this heretic in your sights until I return with Inquisitor af Irramon."

traits.locale_text: {n}Juvenna beruhigt sich ein wenig und nickt dir zustimmend zu.{/n} "Danke, {name}. Euer Beitrag zu unserem Erfolg war {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}unbezahlbar{/d} und wird nicht unbemerkt bleiben ... Es tut mir leid, Vater, dass Ihr der Versuchung nicht widerstehen konntet, aber der Gottimperator weiß, ich habe alles versucht, um Euch auf den Weg der Rechtschaffenheit zurückzuführen." {n}Ohne ein Antwort abzuwarten, eilt sie zur Tür und dreht sich im letzten Moment noch einmal zu dir um.{/n} "Eine letzte Bitte noch, {name}. Behaltet diesen Ketzer im Auge, bis ich mit Inquisitor af Irramon zurückkehre."

languages.text: {n}少し落ち着きを取り戻したジュヴェナは、君に向かって満足げにうなずく。{/n}「ありがとう、{name}。成し遂げられたことへのあなたの貢献は{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}まことに計り知れない{/d}もので、決して見過ごされはしません…父上、この誘惑に抗えなかったこと、残念に思います。ですが神帝陛下もご存じのとおり、私はあなたを正しき道へ導こうと努めました。」{n}返事を待たず、彼女は扉へと向かい、出ていく間際にこちらを振り返る。{/n}「最後にひとつお願いが、{name}。私がafイラモン審問官を連れて戻るまで、この異端者から目を離さないでください。」
languages.original_text: {n}Calming down a little, Juvenna nods approvingly at you.{/n} "Thank you, {name}. Your contribution to what has been accomplished is {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}truly invaluable{/d}, and it will not go unnoticed... I am sorry, Father, that you could not resist this temptation, but, the God-Emperor knows, I tried to lead you back to the path of righteousness." {n}Without waiting for a response, she heads for the door, and turns back to you just as she is about to exit.{/n} "One last request, {name}. Keep this heretic in your sights until I return with Inquisitor af Irramon."
